## Data Leakage Checklist

- [ ] Train/validation/test week boundaries are respected.
- [ ] No valid/test interactions are used in training features.
- [ ] Coupon redemption from future weeks is not used for ranking.
- [ ] Business Utility is described as a proxy when discount/margin assumptions are used.

## Documentation Checklist

- [ ] Data dictionary or schema notes updated, if columns changed.
- [ ] Experiment protocol updated, if metrics/splits changed.
- [ ] Demo spec or README updated, if UI behavior changed.
